Empty.NoPlayers: No players found. Assign characters to users or drag actors into the game window.

Settings.SupportMessage: Support the author and the module on Boosty:

Regeneration.Name: Regeneration
Regeneration.Hint: Automates disabling regeneration when matching damage is received.

BloodMagic.Name: Bloodline
BloodMagic.Hint: Shows a Blood Magic block on the action and lets you link the needed spells to it.

DamageAdjustments.Name: Weak., Res., and Imm.
DamageAdjustments.Hint: Builds weakness, resistance, and immunity rules from selected types and level-based formulas.

Enhancement.Name: Enhancement
Enhancement.Hint: Adds conditional extra text to action descriptions through ItemAlteration based on creature level and/or an action slug.

SceneEye.Name: Enable Scene Eye
SceneEye.Hint: Adds a quick-view eye button next to scene links in chat and journal entries (GM only).

Thumb.Name: Enable Scene Thumb
Thumb.Hint: Adds a custom thumbnail field to the scene configuration form.
Thumb.Label: Thumb Image
Thumb.FieldHint: Custom thumbnail used for this scene in the navigation and directory.

SpellAtWill.Name: Enable spell tags
SpellAtWill.Hint: Adds At Will, Constant, and Self toggles to the PF2E spell sheet.

DefaultStyle.Name: Default journal style
DefaultStyle.Hint: Sets which of this module's journal sheets is used as the default sheet for PF2E journal entries.

Read.Name: Enable read sections
Read.Hint: Activates .read sections in journals so the marked block can be posted to chat from the sheet.

TSFormatMenu.Name: Enable TS Format menu
TSFormatMenu.Hint: Shows the TS submenu in the journal editor Format menu and adds the TS Journal Autoformat action.

ImageSections.Name: Enable image sections
ImageSections.Hint: Adds a Style field to the journal image insert dialog. If filled, the image is inserted as a section with that CSS class.

Notifications.OnlyGM: Only the GM can open this game.
Notifications.DevilsPinChoiceRequired: Choose a skill and a legal target first.
Notifications.DevilsPinNoPlayers: Add at least one participant before starting.
Notifications.DevilsPinNoConfirmedChoices: There are no confirmed throws to resolve.
Notifications.DevilsPinAllChoicesRequired: All participants must choose and confirm before the round can resolve.
Notifications.DevilsPinRepeatResolvedTarget: One of the throws repeats the previous round's resolved target.
Notifications.KubokerNoPlayers: Add at least one participant before the deal.
